design_philosophy: Operational, terminal-adjacent style. Dense but readable. Crisp hierarchy with restrained borders. Uses color strictly for status meaning, avoiding decorative gradients or typical project-management aesthetics.

font_families.primary: font-sans (Geist, Inter, or IBM Plex Sans)

rules.headings: Compact, tracking-tight, minimal weight variation (use Medium/Semibold instead of ExtraBold).
rules.monospace_usage: Strictly for IDs (planId, passId), repo names, branch names, artifact paths, and executor adapter names.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8 space-y-6 md:space-y-8
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-md (max 6px radius for sharp, technical feel)
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-800, never thick, never glowing
spacing_and_layout.density: Compact paddings (px-3 py-2) for table/list items to maintain high data density

elements: Status Badge: Small pill, colored by status
Metadata row: Monospace IDs, Repo/Branch with small icons, artifact path, updated timestamp (text-xs text-zinc-500)

plan_summary_card.layout: Bordered container (border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50), p-5, rounded-md flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4
plan_summary_card.action: Primary button (white/light gray bg, black text) for main action (Open current pass, Review completion evidence, etc.)

progress_summary_strip.layout: Flex row, divide-x divide-zinc-800 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md bg-zinc-950 overflow-hidden
progress_summary_strip.metrics: Each block px-4 py-3 flex-1 flex flex-col gap-1
progress_summary_strip.typography: Label in text-xs text-zinc-500, Value in text-xl font-mono text-zinc-100

pass_timeline_list.layout: Ordered vertical list, border border-zinc-800 rounded-md divide-y divide-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950
pass_timeline_list.row: Flexbox (or Grid cols) py-3 px-4 hover:bg-zinc-900/50 transition-colors items-center gap-4 text-sm

columns.name_and_id: Flex col gap-0.5 min-w-[200px]. Name text-zinc-200 font-medium, ID text-xs font-mono text-zinc-500
columns.status_pill: Compact padding, color based on status
columns.goal_scope: Flex col gap-0.5 flex-1. Goal text-zinc-300, Scope text-xs text-zinc-500 truncate max-w-sm
columns.dependencies: Badges in text-xs font-mono. Red if blocked
columns.actions: Flex gap-2 items-center. Ghost buttons for View/Run/Copy

pass_timeline_list.empty_states: Intentional copy like 'No run created yet', 'No dependencies' in text-zinc-500 italic

artifacts_section.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-4 bg-zinc-900/30
artifacts_section.details: Label/Value pairs. Labels text-xs text-zinc-500, Values text-sm font-mono text-zinc-300

interactive_elements.buttons: Restrained. Primary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-white. Secondary/Ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300
interactive_elements.pills: rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Write React components using .js/.jsx syntax, NOT .tsx. Ensure the layout does not resemble a kanban board or marketing page. Strictly use the provided status color system. Implement the page structure exactly as specified in the components section using Tailwind CSS. Preserve dark theme and compact technical layout. Build components functionally using Shadcn primitives customized for dense, border-restrained styling.
